name: social-intel
description: Cross-platform social intelligence on any topic, brand, or account — fuses Reddit + X/Twitter chatter with grounded web context, paid per call over x402 + MPP, routed via the SELAT Router (selat-pay, USDC on Base).

topic.description: Keyword/topic to listen for across the web and Reddit (used as ${topic} in search bodies/queries).

handle.description: X/Twitter handle (no @) to pull a profile and recent tweets for.

subreddit.description: Subreddit (no r/) to scan the top posts of for community signal.

steps.label: web context — Exa search (routed x402 via SELAT Router)
web corroboration — Tavily search (routed x402 via SELAT Router)
Reddit keyword search — Scrape Creators (ROUTED MPP via SELAT Router)
Reddit subreddit top posts — Scrape Creators (ROUTED MPP via SELAT Router)
X/Twitter profile + counts — Scrape Creators (ROUTED MPP via SELAT Router)
X/Twitter recent tweets + engagement — Scrape Creators (ROUTED MPP via SELAT Router)
